title: LECHONG 5-PACK Squeaky Plush Dog Toys, Soft Chew Toys Bundle for Large Medium Small Dogs Puppy Boredom, Tough Dog Toys Woodland Series Stuffed Animals
features: 【Great Value Dog Toys Bundle】Get five vivid and lifelike woodland animals playmates to your dog at once. Include popular stuffed animal shapes, alligator, frog, turtle, lizard and snake, for all breed size chewers. Value for money and save your time to choose seperatly

【Premium Material and Top Quality】These dog plush toys are made of three-layer composite mesh fabric, wear and tear resistance. Performing well after testing by a extreme pulling force of up to 100 Nm, so dogs can enjoy any tug-of-war to their heart's content without worries

【Squeaky for Hearing Fun】Each dog toy has a build-in squeaker. Once dogs chew on the these toys, the funny squeaky sounds will catch dogs’ attention and make dogs exciting. Dogs love the squeaky sound because it’s mentally stimulating to them

【Multi Function Bulk Dog Toys】These dog chew toys not only help dogs clean their teeth and keep their oral healthy, they can also help dogs relieve anxiety. Satisfy your dog's natural instincts by tearing up toys can also avoid chewing up furniture

【Worry-free Experience】We offer 30 days after-sale services, shall you have any questions or anythings ever failed to live up to your expectations, please feel free to let us know. Warmtips Like every other dog toys, the squeaky toys are not indestructible. We recommend supervised play, and timely replacement of the broken ones
description: Product Description Previous page Crocodile Lizard Frog Turtle Snake Next page 5 most popular stuffed animal dog toys LECHONG- DOG SQUEAKY TOYS Squeaky dog toys for large, medium and small dogs. This dog toy bundle include crocodile, lizard, frog, turtle and snake. all dog toys have build-in squeakers, and unique tie-dye fabric make all toys even more realistic and pretty! Perfect gifts for dogs, such as at Christmas or dog's birthday! What's size of dogs are these dog toys for? The dog toys for small medium and large dogs. Suit for all size of dogs in all life stage, but not reconmend for aggressive chewers. Does every toy have a squeaker inside? Yes. All dog squeaky toys have build-in squeaker, make it more interesting. Are these toys durable and will they get torn up quickly? Don't worry, Lechong dog toys are made of three layers of thickened fabric, which is bite and tear resistant, and the stitches are reinforced to ensure long-lasting durability. Do these stuffed animal dog toys have plastic parts inside? NOT. All of these toys are made from soft, customized tie-dye fabric filled with PP cotton and no other plastic pieces. We have always prioritized the safety of our dog toys.
